question: Which method loads an asset from a Resources folder at runtime? Answer Class.Method.
Which method destroys a GameObject or Component? Method name only.
Which method creates a copy of a prefab at runtime? Method name only.
Which call prints a message to the Unity Console? Answer Class.Method.
Which callback runs each time a component becomes enabled and active? Method name only.
Which callback runs when a component becomes disabled? Method name only.
Which Mathf method linearly interpolates between a and b by t? Method name only.
Which Camera method converts a world position to screen coordinates? Method name only.
Which method casts a ray and reports the first 3D collider hit? Answer Class.Method.
Which class waits a number of seconds in UNSCALED real time inside a coroutine? Class name only.
Which attribute makes a MonoBehaviour run in edit mode as well as play mode (Unity 6 preferred)? Attribute name only.
What type does SceneManager.LoadSceneAsync return? Type name only.
In Unity 6, FindObjectsOfType (plural) is deprecated. What is the replacement method? Method name only.
Inside FixedUpdate, what does Time.deltaTime return (not the frame delta)? Property name only.
In Unity 6, which type can be directly awaited with C# 'await' (unlike a Coroutine)? Type name only.
Does GameObject.Find return INACTIVE GameObjects? Answer yes or no.
Which serialization attribute (added around Unity 2020+) lets a plain C# class with [System.Serializable] also support polymorphism in the Inspector? Attribute name only.
To make a field visible to Unity serialization AND hidden in the Inspector, which attribute hides it? Attribute name only.
Which C# keyword makes a field shared across all instances of a class? Keyword only.
Building strings with + inside Update every frame mainly causes what performance problem? One or two words.
Comparing two floats with == is unreliable. Which Mathf method should you use instead? Answer Class.Method.
A static event whose handlers are never unsubscribed typically causes what? Two words.
Allocating 'new WaitForSeconds' every frame is wasteful; caching one avoids what? One or two words.
Which interface must a class implement to be usable in a foreach loop? Interface name only.
Does Start() always run before the first Update() on the same component? Answer yes or no.
Can you successfully StartCoroutine on a MonoBehaviour whose GameObject is INACTIVE? Answer yes or no.
Does Destroy(gameObject) remove it immediately in the same frame? Answer yes or no.
Will [SerializeField] on a C# PROPERTY (with get/set) serialize it by default? Answer yes or no.
For OnCollisionEnter to fire, at least one of the two objects must have which component? Component name only.
Which method gets a component from the GameObject or any of its children? Method name only.
